senses.definition: the styles and trends of clothing, accessories, makeup, and other items that are popular in a certain time and place

examples.x: Fashion trends can vary greatly depending on the region and culture.
The 80s fashion was known for its bold colors and dramatic styles.
The fashion magazine features tips on how to dress for different body types.
They opened a boutique that sells high-end fashion brands.

senses.definition: the items that we wear, particularly a specific type of items

examples.x: Some cultures have traditional clothing that holds significant cultural value.
The boutique specializes in handmade clothing and accessories.
The clothing brand is known for its sustainable and ethical manufacturing practices.
They donated their old clothing to a local charity to help those in need.
When traveling to a hot climate, it's essential to pack lightweight and breathable clothing.

senses.definition: a shirt for women, typically with a collar, buttons and sleeves

examples.x: She decided to wear a white blouse and a black skirt for the job interview.
She wore a stylish blouse with her favorite jeans to the party.
The blouse has a V-neckline, which she likes because it's flattering.
The blouse has ruffles on the sleeves, adding a feminine touch.
This blouse is made of soft and comfortable fabric.

senses.definition: underpants with short legs, worn by men

examples.x: He rolled up the hem of his shorts for a more fashionable look.
Shorts are perfect for warm weather and outdoor activities.
The company has a dress code that allows wearing shorts on Fridays.
The lightweight fabric of the shorts makes them ideal for travel.
The store has a wide variety of shorts in different colors and styles.

senses.definition: a type of small bag in or on clothing, used for carrying small things such as money, keys, etc.

examples.x: He kept his keys in the pocket of his jeans.
She discovered a crumpled note in her jacket pocket.
The dress has a hidden pocket on the side.
The jacket has two front pockets for storing small items.
The pants have back pockets where you can keep your wallet.

senses.definition: a small, round object, usually made of plastic or metal, sewn onto a piece of clothing and used for fastening two parts together

examples.x: He carefully fastened the buttons on his shirt.
She added colorful buttons to her backpack for decoration.
She couldn't find a matching button for her coat, so she used a different one.
The dress has decorative buttons along the neckline.
The jacket has three buttons in the front for closing it.

senses.definition: the special set of clothes that all members of an organization or a group wear at work, or children wear at a particular school

examples.x: The employees at the hotel wear a professional uniform.
The factory workers had to wear protective uniforms and helmets for safety reasons.
The police officer's uniform was decorated with shiny badges and a badge.
The security guards' uniforms made them easily recognizable and approachable.
The students wear a school uniform every day.

senses.definition: an object with a circular folding frame covered in cloth, used as protection against rain or sun

examples.x: I always carry an umbrella in my bag in case it rains.
It's pouring outside, so I need to grab my umbrella before heading out.
Sarah used her colorful umbrella to shield herself from the sun.
The beachgoers sought refuge under their beach umbrellas to avoid getting sunburned.
When the sudden rain started, everyone rushed to open their umbrellas and find shelter.

senses.definition: an item, such as a bag, hat, piece of jewelry, etc., that is worn or carried because it makes an outfit more beautiful or attractive

examples.x: A belt can be both a practical and stylish accessory for jeans or dresses.
Adding a scarf as an accessory can make a simple outfit more elegant.
He chose a stylish watch as his favorite accessory to complete his outfit.
Sunglasses are a popular accessory for protecting your eyes from the sun.
The store offers a wide selection of fashion accessories, including belts, scarves, and hats.

senses.definition: a small clock worn on a strap on your wrist or carried in your pocket

examples.x: He wears his watch every day, even when he goes swimming.
Her watch has a leather strap and a gold dial.
I need to set my watch because it's running a few minutes slow.
My friend collects vintage watches from different eras.
She checked her watch to see what time it was.

senses.definition: a pair of lenses set in a frame that rests on the nose and ears, which we wear to see more clearly

examples.x: He cleans his glasses regularly to keep them smudge-free.
I need to buy new glasses because my old ones broke.
She forgot her glasses at home, so she couldn't read the menu.
She uses glasses with blue light filters to reduce eye strain while using the computer.
The glasses make him look more sophisticated and professional.

senses.definition: dark glasses that we wear to protect our eyes from sunlight or glare

examples.x: He forgot to bring his sunglasses to the beach, and his eyes got sunburned.
He squinted in the sun until he remembered he had his sunglasses in his bag.
She bought a new pair of sunglasses with polarized lenses for better clarity.
She wore her sunglasses to protect her eyes from the bright sun.
The sunglasses had a cool design with mirrored lenses.

senses.definition: a flat, leather or plastic case with a handle, used for carrying papers or documents

examples.x: Her briefcase had a combination lock for added security.
She always keeps her laptop in her briefcase when traveling.
The briefcase had a comfortable handle for easy carrying.
The briefcase had multiple compartments to keep things organized.
The businessman rushed to catch the train, holding his briefcase tightly.

senses.definition: a type of soft flat hat with a visor, typically worn by men and boys

examples.x: During the winter, he always wears a warm woolen cap to keep his head cozy.
He tipped his cap as a sign of respect to the elderly woman.
My brother likes to collect caps from different countries as souvenirs.
The cap had the logo of his favorite sports team embroidered on it.

senses.definition: a decorative item, worn around the wrist or arm

examples.x: He bought a gold bracelet with a delicate design for his wife.
My sister loves to wear a beaded bracelet that she made herself.
She received a beautiful silver bracelet as a birthday gift.
The bracelet jingles softly as she moves her hand.
The elegant bracelet complements her evening gown perfectly.

senses.definition: a pocket-sized, folding case that is used for storing paper money, coin money, credit cards, etc.

examples.x: He reached into his back pocket and pulled out his wallet.
He took out a few coins from his wallet to buy a snack.
His wallet was stolen, so he had to cancel his credit cards.
She found a lost wallet on the street and returned it to its owner.
She kept her money and credit cards in her wallet.

senses.definition: a stylish necklace made of linked metal rings that is worn around the neck as jewelry

examples.x: A friend admired her chain and asked where she bought it.
He gifted her a beautiful gold chain for their anniversary.
She lost her chain during the trip and was upset about it.
She wore a stylish silver chain that matched her earrings.
The chain had a small heart charm hanging from it.

senses.definition: a piece of jewelry worn on the ear

examples.x: He surprised her with a set of elegant pearl earrings on her birthday.
Her grandmother gifted her a vintage pair of silver hoop earrings.
She lost one of her favorite earrings while traveling.
She wore a pair of beautiful diamond earrings to the party.
The actress dazzled on the red carpet with her stunning gold earrings.

senses.definition: a small, round band of metal such as gold, silver, etc. that we wear on our finger, and is often decorated with precious stones

examples.x: He bought a silver ring with a blue gemstone for his mother's birthday.
She lost her favorite ring while swimming in the lake.
She received a sparkling diamond ring as an engagement gift.

senses.definition: a piece of jewelry, consisting of a chain, string of beads, etc. worn around the neck as decoration

examples.x: He gifted her a silver necklace with a star-shaped charm.
Her diamond necklace sparkled under the bright lights.
The elegant necklace complemented her outfit perfectly.
The necklace had a beautiful pearl hanging from the chain.
The store offered a wide variety of beaded necklaces.

senses.definition: objects such as necklaces, bracelets or rings, typically made from precious metals such as gold and silver, that we wear as decoration

examples.x: He bought a lovely piece of jewelry for his mother's birthday.
She admired the beautiful jewelry displayed in the shop window.
The artisan crafted unique and handmade jewelry using silver and gemstones.

senses.definition: ‌a liquid, typically made from flowers, that has a pleasant smell

examples.x: He bought a new bottle of his favorite perfume as a gift for his girlfriend.
She sprayed a little perfume on her wrist before going out to dinner.
The luxurious perfume brand was known for its high-quality ingredients.
The perfume lingered in the air long after she had left the room.
The store offered a wide variety of perfumes, from floral to fruity scents.

senses.definition: (of clothes) not tight or fitting closely, often allowing freedom of movement

examples.x: After losing weight, his pants became loose and he needed a smaller size.
His pants were too loose after he lost weight.
His watch strap was too loose, so it kept sliding down his wrist.
The child's shoes were too loose, so they kept slipping off while running.
The loose shirt felt comfortable on a hot summer day.

senses.definition: (of clothes or shoes) fitting closely or firmly, especially in an uncomfortable way

examples.x: His shoes were too tight, and they gave him blisters.
She couldn't wait to take off her tight dress after the party.
The gloves were too tight on his hands, making it difficult to move his fingers.
The new jeans were so tight that she had trouble buttoning them.
The tight collar of his shirt made him feel uncomfortable.

senses.definition: to be of the right size or shape for someone

examples.x: Can you try on these shoes to see if they fit?
I need to find a hat that fits comfortably on my head.
The costume didn't fit properly, so they had to make alterations before the performance.
The dress fits perfectly; it's just the right size for me.

senses.definition: to put on a piece of clothing to see if it fits and how it looks

examples.x: He went to the store to try on some new shoes.
The store provides a fitting room where customers can try on clothes before purchasing them.
They allowed her to try on the wedding dress before making a final decision.

senses.definition: to place or wear something on the body, including clothes, accessories, etc.
to remove a piece of clothing or accessory from your or another's body

examples.x: After a long day at work, I like to take off my high heels.
Before swimming, make sure to take off your jewelry.
It's getting warm, so I need to take off my sweater.
Please take off your shoes before entering the house.
The doctor asked the patient to take off their shirt for the examination.

senses.definition: to put different clothes on

examples.x: After getting wet in the rain, they went home to change into dry clothes.
She likes to change into pajamas as soon as she gets home from work.
They hurried into the locker room to change.
You should change out of your muddy clothes before coming inside.

senses.definition: very damaged or old in a way that has become unusable

examples.x: He donated his worn-out clothes to a local charity.
His worn-out backpack couldn't handle another school year.
She threw away her worn-out shoes and bought a new pair.
The chair's fabric was torn and worn-out from years of use.
The old, worn-out sofa needed to be replaced.
The worn-out tires on the car needed to be replaced before the long road trip.
The couch cushions were completely worn-out, offering little support.

senses.definition: a long and narrow item that you usually wear around your waist to hold your clothes in place or to decorate your outfit

examples.x: He tightened his belt before heading out for a run.
She accessorized her outfit with a stylish leather belt.
He forgot his belt, so his trousers kept sliding down.
The dress came with a matching belt to complete the look.
